text:
You can use new option OPTIONS_DEFAULT_OTHER_ARCHS:
OPTIONS_DEFAULT_aarch64=
OPTIONS_DEFAULT_armv6=
OPTIONS_DEFAULT_armv7=
OPTIONS_DEFAULT_OTHER_ARCHS=   FREEIPMI
